sentences.arabic: تَسْبَحُ مَرْيَمُ فِي الْمَسْبَحِ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ فِي الْأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Merjema pliva u bazenu tri puta sedmično.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam swims in the pool three times a week.

sentences.arabic: تَقُولُ إِنَّ السِّبَاحَةَ تُرِيحُ الْعَضَلَاتِ وَتُقَوِّي الْجِسْمَ.
sentences.translation: Kaže da plivanje opušta mišiće i jača tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: She says that swimming relaxes the muscles and strengthens the body.

sentences.arabic: تَبَدَّأُ بِعَشْرِ دَقَائِقَ مِنَ التَّمْدِيدِ قَبْلَ السِّبَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Počinje s deset minuta istezanja prije plivanja.
sentences.translationEn: She starts with ten minutes of stretching before swimming.

sentences.translation: Nakon plivanja osjeća se jako odmorno.
sentences.translationEn: After swimming she feels very relaxed.
